description:
Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities include:

1. Assist faculty in conducting training sessions on Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine Learning (ML), and Data Science.
2. Support students during coding labs, practical sessions, and hands-on exercises.
3. Guide students in completing Python programming assignments and projects.
4. Assist in preparing datasets, presentations, coding exercises, and other learning materials.
5. Monitor student attendance, progress, and performance records.
6. Help students build and maintain project portfolios using Google Colab and GitHub.
7. Participate in curriculum development, content creation, and other academic support activities.
8. Conduct doubt-solving sessions under the guidance of senior trainers.
9. Collaborate with the academic team to ensure an engaging and effective learning experience for students.
Only those candidates can apply who:

                1. are available for full time (in-office) internship                    

                2. can start the internship between 23rd Jun'26 and 28th Jul'26                    

                3. are available for duration of 6 months                    

                4. are from Mumbai only                    

                5. have relevant skills and interests
1. B.Tech, BCA, MCA, B.Sc IT, Computer Science, Data Science or related field.                

                    2. Final-year students and recent graduates are encouraged to apply.                

                    3. Strong interest in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Education.                

                    4. Basic knowledge of Python programming is mandatory.                

                    5. Good communication and presentation skills preferred.                

                    6. Candidates willing to conduct a short teaching demo will be preferred.
Stipend Structure:
Fixed pay: ₹ 5,000 /month
                    

Incentive pay: ₹ 15,000 /month

Noida
Basti Ki Pathshala Foundation is a Government-registered organization established under the Indian Societies Act of 1860. We are a grassroots organization dedicated to breaking the barriers of education in underserved communities. Founded with a mission to provide quality education to children living in slum areas, we strive to create a nurturing learning environment where every child has the opportunity to thrive. Through innovative teaching methods, community engagement, and partnerships, we empower children with the knowledge and skills they need to build a brighter future. Our commitment extends beyond the classroom as we work towards bridging the educational gap and fostering long-term sustainable change in the lives of marginalized families.

description:
Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities include: 

1. Analyzing and improving the performance of advanced algorithms on large-scale datasets and cutting-edge research in machine intelligence and machine learning applications.

2. Thinking through product scenarios and goals, identify key challenges, map requirements into Machine Learning (ML) tasks, and design experimental processes for iteration and optimization.

3. Building and implementing working prototypes of scalable systems in artificial intelligence (AI) applications.

4. Gaining a broad understanding of research areas, utilising applicable research techniques, staying updated on industry trends, and sharing knowledge with immediate team members.

5. Reviewing data quality and technical constraints, preparing datasets for analysis, and actively troubleshooting data quality issues by deciding which data to include or exclude.

6. Assisting with the development of usable datasets for modelling purposes and supporting the scaling of feature ideation and data preparation workflows.

7. Cleaning and adapting processed data for machine learning purposes under the direct supervision and guidance of senior team members.
Only those candidates can apply who:

                1. are available for full time (in-office) internship                    

                2. are available for duration of 3 months                    

                3. have relevant skills and interests
Only those candidates can apply who:                

                    1. Are currently pursuing a Doctorate Degree (PhD) in Statistics, Econometrics, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, or a highly related quantitative field.                

                    2. Must have at least one additional quarter/semester of school remaining following the completion of this internship.                

                    3. Are available for full-time, fully on-site work at one of Microsoft's India office locations.                

                    4. Are open to less than 25% travel if required by the business group.
1. Strong foundations in advanced algorithms, machine intelligence, and machine learning applications.

2. Experience working with large-scale datasets and designing experimental processes for model optimization.

3. Proficiency in implementing scalable AI prototypes and utilizing state-of-the-art data modeling tools.

4. Deep analytical mindset with the ability to translate real-world business/product scenarios into structured ML tasks.

5. Knowledge of data engineering concepts, feature ideation, data preparation, and data quality troubleshooting.

6. Strong research capabilities with a keen interest in staying up-to-date with emerging tech and industry trends.

7. Excellent collaboration and communication skills to share insights effectively within a global team framework.

Website
Microsoft, founded in 1975 by Bill Gates and Paul Allen, is a global technology powerhouse headquartered in Redmond, Washington. With a market capitalization of around $3 trillion and annual revenue of $245 billion in 2023, Microsoft leads in cloud computing, AI, and enterprise solutions. In India, Microsoft Azure, Office 365, and LinkedIn play a crucial role in empowering businesses and professionals, while the company invests heavily in AI research, cybersecurity, and digital skilling programs. Microsoft’s initiatives support startups, enterprises, and government organizations in accelerating digital transformation. Committed to sustainability and technological advancement, Microsoft continues to shape the future of computing while fostering digital innovation across India and the world.

Website
SankalpTaru is a technology-enabled environmental non-profit committed to restoring ecosystems, strengthening rural livelihoods, and inspiring collective climate action. Working across India's diverse and challenging landscapes   including deserts, mountains, farmlands, mangroves, urban spaces, degraded lands, and community commons   SankalpTaru designs and implements holistic programs in agroforestry, community afforestation, urban greening, water conservation, and biodiversity restoration.

Its work goes beyond tree plantation by combining community ownership, scientific planning, long-term stewardship, and digital transparency through geotagging, dashboards, satellite monitoring, IoT, and blockchain-enabled traceability. With millions of trees planted, thousands of communities supported, and partnerships with corporates, institutions, volunteers, and citizens, SankalpTaru continues to build a people-powered movement for a greener, healthier, and more resilient planet.

dealbreakers: Must be available for full time (in-office) internship
Must be able to start the internship between 2nd Jul'26 and 6th Aug'26
Must be available for duration of 2 months

description:
You will design, build, and deploy AI agent systems that operate in real-world environments. This is a hands-on engineering role focused on agent orchestration, LLM integration, and solving reliability challenges that differentiate working prototypes from production-ready products.

You will learn quickly, take ownership of features end-to-end, and see your work deployed rapidly.

Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities include:

1. Build and maintain AI agent workflows using Python, LangChain, and LangGraph.
2. Implement agent orchestration logic, including state management, tool calling, memory, retries, and fallback mechanisms.
3. Integrate LLMs with real-world infrastructure such as telephony, WhatsApp, email, CRMs, and vector databases.
4. Debug and improve existing systems, including code developed by other team members.
5. Monitor AI agents in production and resolve issues as they arise.
6. Contribute ideas related to system architecture, scalability, and reliability.

How to Apply:

Submit your resume along with a GitHub profile link or a link to a working project you have built. A functional project is valued more than a polished CV.

Note: This is an on-site role based in Vadodara. Remote or hybrid options are not available for this position.
Only those candidates can apply who:

                1. are available for full time (in-office) internship                    

                2. can start the internship between 30th Jun'26 and 4th Aug'26                    

                3. are available for duration of 6 months                    

                4. are from Vadodara only                    

                5. have relevant skills and interests
Required Skills:                

                    1. Working knowledge of Python.                

                    2. Familiarity with LangChain and LangGraph; candidates should have built at least one working project using these technologies.                

                    3. Understanding of AI agent concepts, including prompts, tool usage, control flow, and common failure scenarios.                

                    4. Comfort working with APIs, Git, and independently reading technical documentation.                

                    5. Genuine curiosity and willingness to learn quickly in a fast-paced environment.                

                    Good to Have:                

                    1. Exposure to RAG systems such as FAISS or Qdrant, or workflow automation tools like n8n.                

                    2. Experience with voice AI platforms such as ElevenLabs, Twilio, or Exotel, or messaging integrations.                

                    3. Familiarity with Next.js or Supabase for full-stack development.                

                    4. Side projects, GitHub contributions, or experience building and deploying independent projects.
What We Offer:

1. Real ownership and production experience from day one.
2. Direct mentorship and a flat, fast-moving team environment.
3. Exposure to cutting-edge AI agent and voice AI technologies.
4. A clear growth path as the company expands its vertical AI products.

What We Don't Require:

1. A perfect resume or a big college name.
2. A long list of certifications.
